summary: Video card feed app where each card fits within the mobile viewport height, allowing users to scroll through one complete card at a time (TikTok/Reels-style layout).
architectural_notes: Each video card must fit within the mobile viewport height — no overflow. Layout should support one-card-at-a-time scrolling.

existing_features.title: Fix the VideoPostCard layout so the entire card — including the header (avatar, username, date), title, video, and action buttons — fits within the visible mobile viewport height without overflowing. The card height must be constrained to the available screen height minus the sticky header, so users can scroll through one complete card at a time. The video element must shrink/flex to fill remaining space rather than overflow below the fold.

projectName: Fix video card to fit fully within mobile viewport height
